dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9233 IH: To redesignate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 2777 Logan Avenue in San Diego, California, as the “Armando Rodriguez Post Office”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Vargas introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To redesignate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 2777 Logan Avenue in San Diego, California, as the Armando Rodriguez Post Office.

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 2777 Logan Avenue in San Diego, California, and known as the Southeastern Post Office, shall be known and designated as the Armando Rodriguez Post Office.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Armando Rodriguez Post Office.
